creator: Karim Saad
source_text:
Diabetic Friendly Guacamole 🥑 Chicken Salad and it’s Low Carb too! 🤯 (recipe 👇🏽) 

Macros per serving ( makes x3): 396 calories | 37g P | 11g C | 23g F

Announcements:
✅ Want to lose weight without eating boring food? My digital cookbooks include 180+ high-protein recipes with calories and macros included! Grab yours on my site today! 😊
✅ OR Comment “cookbook” and I’ll send you the link! (Macros and Calories Included) 💪🏽
✅ I developed new seasonings for everyday cooking! @spicexseasoning OUT now! 👀

Ingredients:
1lb chicken, boneless, skinless & shredded 🍗 
2 whole avocados 🥑 
1/4 small red onion, diced 🧅 
1/2 cup fresh cilantro, chopped 🌿 
1 tsp onion powder 🧂 
1 tsp garlic powder 🧄 
1 tsp cumin 🌶️ 
Juice of 2 limes 🍋‍🟩 
Salt & black pepper to taste 🧂 

Serve it on lettuce wraps, baked corn tortilla tostadas, or eat it straight up 🤤 

If you want weekly recipes and discounts straight to your email inbox every Sunday then comment “newsletter” 😌📧
.
.
.
.
